code-runner.executorMap.cpp: $env:PATH = "D:\AskManyAI\ucrt64\bin;" + $env:PATH ; cd $dir ; if (-not (Test-Path 'build')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'build' | Out-Null } ; & "D:\AskManyAI\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe" -std=c++20 -g "$fileName" -o "build\$fileNameWithoutExt.exe" ; if ($?) { & ".\build\$fileNameWithoutExt.exe" }
code-runner.executorMap.java: $env:PATH = "D:\JDK\bin;" + $env:PATH ; cd $dir ; if (-not (Test-Path 'build')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'build' | Out-Null } ; javac -d build "$fileName" ; if ($?) { java -cp build "$fileNameWithoutExt" }
code-runner.executorMap.go: $env:PATH = "E:\06_DevTools\Go\bin;" + $env:PATH ; cd $dir ; if (-not (Test-Path 'build')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'build' | Out-Null } ; go build -o "build\$fileNameWithoutExt.exe" "$fileName" ; if ($?) { & ".\build\$fileNameWithoutExt.exe" }
